title: crantzia schlimii
side_effects: Crantzia schlimii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased heart rate. Improper use of the plant may also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea. In severe cases, excessive consumption of Crantzia schlimii can cause more serious health complications, such as liver damage and seizures. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for any health benefit.
